CONTENT.Career: On 27 May 2019, VfL Wolfsburg announced that Itter would be joining SC Freiburg for the upcoming season. On June 3, 2022, Freiburg announced that Itter would join Greuther Fürth on a permanent basis.
CONTENT.Personal life: He is the twin brother of fellow professional footballer Davide Itter.
CONTENT.External links: Gian-Luca Itter at kicker (in German)Gian-Luca Itter at SoccerwayGian-Luca Itter at DFB (also available in German)
CONTENT.Career statistics: As of matches played on 22 May 2018

SUMMARY: Gian-Luca Itter (born 5 January 1999), commonly known as Luca Itter, is a German professional footballer who plays as a left-back for 2. Bundesliga club Greuther Fürth.
